description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Docker images build and push that can be triggered manually. The workflow consists of two jobs: obtain-dockerfiles and build-and-push. The obtain-dockerfiles job runs on a self-hosted Linux environment, checks out the develop branch, and uploads the dockerfiles artifact. The build-and-push job depends on obtain-dockerfiles, runs on the same environment, and performs the following steps: download the dockerfiles artifact, set up QEMU and Docker Buildx, log in to the GitHub Container Registry, and build and push a Docker image using the docker/bake-action with the provided docker-bake.hcl file.
